'''Ana Tathis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] trained as the [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Caryn (Jedi)|Caryn]] at some point during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. After Caryn taught Tathis all she could, she disappeared, leaving Tathis on her own.<ref name="TRG" />

==History==
During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Ana Tathis lived on a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where a local woman named [[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[Caryn (Jedi)|Caryn]] was a favorite storyteller of her village's children. When Tathis was of sixteen or seventeen [[Galactic Standard Calendar|years]], Caryn approached her and told the girl that she had [[Force sense/Legends|sensed]] her in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Caryn told Tathis that her presence in the Force was a strong one and that she wished for Tathis to become her [[Padawan/Legends|apprentice]].<ref name="TRG" />

Tathis eagerly took to Caryn's [[Jedi training/Legends|training]], and labored in her master's tropical gardens, making them lush with beauty. Through her physical labors, Tathis learned focus and concentration. Over the course of three years, Tathis learned the skills of [[Force power/Legends|controlling her body]], [[Force healing/Legends|Force healing]], [[Force sense/Legends|seeking out knowledge]] and [[Farsight/Legends|farseeing]]. Though Tathis became quite skilled, she was never able to read Caryn's mind. After a time, Caryn felt that she had taught Tathis all she was able, and bid her farewell.<ref name="TRG" />
